description: Calculate final grades and assign letter grades using the following weighted categories: 40% tests, 30% homework, 20% quizzes (dropping the lowest score), and 10% participation.

natural_language.prompt: Complete the gradebook by calculating category averages, applying weighted grading (Tests 40%, Homework 30%, Quizzes 20% with lowest dropped, Participation 10%), and assigning letter grades A-F.
